title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · Mastery Check
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a risk-tiered approval matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify actions by reversibility, blast radius, sensitivity, and external impact.
Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.
Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
